summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VBA Excel retail fabric/tailoring business management system converted to web app. All backend APIs (19/19) and frontend functionality working perfectly. System is fully functional with proper data seeding, navigation, and business logic flows.
passed_tests: All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Dashboard loads with correct stats (revenue ₹2,49,392, 44 customers, job work status)
Sidebar navigation works across all 8 pages
New Bill creation flow works end-to-end
Job Work kanban with tailoring/embroidery tabs functional
Settlements page with customer/order selection working
Daybook with date filtering and tally functionality working
Data seeding successful (261 items, 9 advances from Excel)
Mobile responsiveness with sidebar toggle working
Real-time data integration (dashboard updates after bill creation)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all navigation, forms, and integration tests passed)
